sql_array: CREATE TABLE example_table (id INTEGER, str1 VARCHAR, str2 VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO example_table (id, str1, str2) VALUES (1, 'duck', 'db');
INSERT INTO example_table (id, str1, str2) VALUES (2, 'database', 'data');
SELECT id, levenshtein(str1, str2) AS edit_distance FROM example_table;
UPDATE example_table SET str2 = 'duckdb' WHERE id = 1;
